Selected Work ( 01 — 07 )
01EdTech · Web Design2024

SkillElevate
Career Platform

skillelevate.com

An EdTech platform designed to bridge the gap between education and employability. The challenge was making skill-building feel aspirational rather than transactional — communicating trust, career growth, and accessibility in one visual language.

The layout leads with a confident hero, structured course discovery, and a company-trust section that anchors the brand in real-world outcomes. Clean hierarchy guides users from awareness to enrollment without cognitive overload.

02SaaS · Landing Page Redesign2024

ClientDesk
Support Streamlined

clientdesk.io

A SaaS landing page redesign for ClientDesk — a client support and ticketing platform for growing small businesses. The original design lacked visual coherence and failed to communicate value quickly.

The redesign leads with a bold, confident headline, surfaces social proof early, and structures the feature narrative as a progressive reveal. Each section earns attention before asking for it.

03E-Commerce · Web Design2025

The Home Garden
Plant Buying Experience

thehomegarden.com.au

An e-commerce web design for a boutique tropical plant nursery in Brisbane. The challenge was translating the warmth of a physical nursery into a digital storefront that feels personal, not clinical.

Photography-first layouts, an earthy palette, and category-driven discovery make the shopping experience feel like browsing a well-curated garden center — calm, trustworthy, and inviting.

meets digital trust

04Dashboard · UI Design2024

School & Management
Dashboard

school-management.app

A school management dashboard designed for teachers and administrators — bringing together student data, grades, performance analytics, and scheduling into one coherent interface.

The UI prioritizes data clarity over decoration. A calm sidebar, card-based modules, and clear data visualizations allow educators to act on information without friction.

05Travel · Landing Page2024

Travel & Adventure
Agency Web

jadoo-travels.com

A travel agency landing page designed to evoke wanderlust and inspire action. The design uses energetic typography, destination photography, and a clear booking narrative to move users from curiosity to conversion.

The three-step booking section breaks complexity into clarity. Testimonials and airline logos build trust, while destination cards use pricing transparency to lower hesitation barriers.

booking intent

06HR Tech · Product DesignDec 2025 – Feb 2026

Vidmagin
Hiring Intelligence

vidmagin.com

A product landing page for Vidmagin — an AI-powered hiring intelligence platform that helps teams evaluate candidates beyond resumes. The design had to communicate a sophisticated concept quickly and earn trust from HR decision-makers.

The page builds its narrative in three acts: problem identification, solution proof, and pricing. Warm gradient tones soften the AI tech feel, making the product feel human and approachable.

07Software Studio · Brand Web2024

Adra Product Studio
Software Company

adraproductstudio.com

A brand website for Adra Product Studio — a software product company positioning itself as a launchpad for startups. Reflects technical credibility with an energetic, founder-facing personality.

The page combines a dark hero with a light-mode service section — deliberate contrast that signals both premium positioning and accessibility. The team section humanizes the brand.

About
the work

I’m Aakash P, a UI/UX Designer based in Coimbatore, India — working at the intersection of logic and feeling, where every layout decision carries intention.

I’ve designed across SaaS, EdTech, E-Commerce, HR Tech, and Travel — building interfaces that are not just visually refined, but usable and grounded in real user thinking.

Skilled in Figma, wireframing, prototyping, and design systems — with frontend basics in HTML, CSS & JS.

StructureGrid · Hierarchy · Form
RestraintLess · Intention · Clarity
TypographyTone · Weight · Rhythm
EmotionFeel · Human · Time
SystemsScale · Consistency · Logic
